title: They Came and Stole His Soul
original_title: Eles Vieram e Roubaram Sua Alma
overview: With an old VHS camera and help from a loyal friend who supports him almost unconditionally, Mateus records all kinds of images for a homemade movie. In his early-20s and living in an industrial suburb, Mateus confusingly tries to find some link between the stuff he shoots and the people in his life.

trailers.title: Eles vieram e roubaram sua alma (They came and stole his soul)
